_note: BREAK-PROBE: targeted interaction. TWO questions. (A) WEIGHTED targeting — 'help the neediest kin most' — SHOULD already work: affect hits all neighbors but the value reads target.X, so weak targets get more. (B) SINGLE-BEST targeting — 'act on ONLY my weakest rival' — suspected GAP: affect hits ALL neighbors, link/claim pick random/scan, nothing selects an argmin/argmax peer to act on alone. We test A works and probe whether B is really needed or if weighting covers it.
